name: Trade Flow & Mid-Price Momentum Combo
hypothesis: A burst of buyer-initiated trades (`trade_imbalance_signed`) should be more predictive of continued upside when it occurs within an existing uptrend (`rolling_momentum`). This combination aims to capture entries during impulsive legs of a trend, improving on the `tradeflow_plus_obi` spec by using a more persistent trend measure.
mutation_note: The parent spec showed that high trade flow + high OBI can be mean-reverting. This spec swaps the noisy `obi_1` for a smoother `rolling_momentum` filter to test if trade flow is more effective as a trend-confirmation signal.
